name: The Arc of Kansas
description: State chapter of The Arc advocating for people with intellectual and developmental disabilities across Kansas.

name: Kansas Infant-Toddler Services (tiny-k)
description: Kansas early intervention program providing services for infants and toddlers from birth to age 3 with developmental delays or disabilities.

name: Special Olympics Kansas
description: Year-round sports training and athletic competition for Kansans with intellectual disabilities.

name: Children's Mercy Kansas City - Developmental and Behavioral Health
description: Comprehensive developmental and behavioral health services for children at a nationally recognized children's hospital.

name: Disability Rights Center of Kansas
description: Kansas' designated protection and advocacy organization providing legal advocacy for people with disabilities.

name: Assistive Technology for Kansans
description: Kansas assistive technology program providing device demonstrations, loans, and information to individuals with disabilities.

name: Kansas ABLE Savings Plan
description: Tax-advantaged savings accounts for eligible Kansans with disabilities to save without affecting means-tested benefits.

name: Kansas Department for Aging and Disability Services (KDADS)
description: State agency overseeing disability services, Medicaid waivers, and supports for Kansans with disabilities.

name: Camp Hope - Paraquad
description: Adaptive camp programs providing outdoor recreation and social opportunities for youth and adults with disabilities.

name: Families Together Inc.
description: Kansas parent training and information center providing support, education, and resources for families of children with disabilities.

name: Kansas Vocational Rehabilitation Services
description: State services supporting Kansans with disabilities in preparing for, finding, and keeping competitive employment.

name: Kansas Medicaid HCBS Waivers
description: Medicaid waiver programs funding home and community-based services for Kansans with disabilities.

name: Rainbows United Therapy Services
description: Pediatric therapy services including occupational, physical, and speech therapy for children with special needs.
